title: LocalDef Function
parameters: localNumber	Integer expression representing which local to return status for.
see_also:
Returns local definition status.

Local

LocalClr

Local Function Example

Function DisplayLocalDef(localNum As Integer)

		  If LocalDef(localNum) = False Then

		    Print "Local ", localNum, "is not defined"

		  Else

		    Print "Local 1: ",

		    Print Local(localNum)

		  EndIf

		Fend
examples:
Function DisplayLocalDef(localNum As Integer)
		  If LocalDef(localNum) = False Then
		    Print "Local ", localNum, "is not defined"
		  Else
		    Print "Local 1: ",
		    Print Local(localNum)
		  EndIf
		Fend
